pi_items.source: Confirmed by task.json description and verifier.py logic requiring this exact alert name.
Confirmed by task.json description and verifier.py logic requiring this exact dashboard name.
Confirmed by setup_splunk.sh which creates and ingests data into the 'tutorial' index, and verifier.py which checks for 'tutorial' in the search query.
Confirmed via user-seed.conf setup in install_splunk.sh.
Confirmed via user-seed.conf setup in install_splunk.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task correctly expects the agent to use the 'tutorial' index populated with Splunk's synthetic Buttercup Games tutorial data. The required Splunk credentials (admin / SplunkAdmin1!) are accurately set up via user-seed.conf during environment initialization. Both the expected alert name ('Unbalanced_Load_Alert') and dashboard name ('Web_Infrastructure_Health') match the exact strings evaluated by the verifier scripts.
